iran_nuke.notes: Day 16 00:00 — ELEVATED STABLE. No new nuclear-specific signals. Supreme Leader wounded status continues to add long-term desperation calculus. No weapons-grade enrichment or nuclear test detected. Kharg Island strike deliberately spared oil infrastructure — calibrated pressure, not escalation to nuclear threshold. 14 + 12 (hidden HEU) = 26.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 16 00:00 — IMMINENT RISING. NEW SIGNALS: (1) Iran threatens to strike ANY US-linked energy infrastructure in region (CNN/AJ). (2) Pentagon vows to 'ramp up' military campaign against Iran (AJ liveblog). (3) US orders Americans out of Iraq (Guardian). KHARG ISLAND: US struck military targets only — air strip, air defences, docks, control tower. Oil infrastructure deliberately spared. Trump calls it 'most powerful bombing operation in region's history.' Oil exports from Kharg reportedly unaffected, 2 ships still loading. HORMUZ: Iran FM Araghchi clarifies — only closed to US/Israeli ships, NOT full closure. But effectively still disrupted. Two Indian ships allowed through as exception. FUJAIRAH: Fire at UAE oil hub. Hamas urges Iran to stop Gulf attacks. Iran warns UAE ports and 'American hideouts' are targets. Asia rationing fossil fuels. Capped at 100, trend rising due to Pentagon escalation + infrastructure threats.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 00:00 — IMMINENT STABLE. IRGC confirms coordinated missile/drone launch with Hezbollah for al-Quds Day. Israeli preventive attacks reached Kfarkela and Qouzah — Lebanese army redeployed from border posts (Wikipedia/AJ). Violation of 2024 ceasefire agreement. No new signal triggers. 92 (stable).

turkey.notes: IMMINENT STABLE. Turkey continuing mediation role in Pak-Afghan conflict alongside China. No new intercept events or Incirlik incidents. Mediation role slightly de-escalatory for Turkey's own profile but regional instability keeps pressure high. 65 + 6 (Iran coupling) = 71.

india.notes: ELEVATED STABLE. India remains diplomatically engaged. Two Indian ships granted passage through Hormuz by Iran — exception to blockade. Energy security concern remains. No military escalation signals on India-Pakistan border. 20 (stable).

russia.notes: CRITICAL STABLE. Russia continuing to benefit from $100+ oil amid Gulf disruption. US eases sanctions on Russian oil. Russia wants Zaporizhzhia NPP control. No direct military intervention in ME. Kremlin expects to reap strategic benefits from Iran war — per NPR analysis. 42 + 8 (Iran coupling) = 50.

china.notes: DETERRENT STABLE. China actively mediating Pak-Afghan — Wang Yi urged ceasefire via talks not force (AlArabiya/Al-Monitor). Special envoy shuttling between countries. China reducing fossil fuel consumption faster via electrification. No new escalation signals. 15 (stable).

north_korea.notes: CRITICAL RISING. NEW CONFIRMATION: 10+ ballistic missiles fired from Sunan area near Pyongyang into East Sea, ~350km range. Confirmed by Reuters, Bloomberg, Guardian, AJ, Zee News. Third provocation this week during US-SK 'Freedom Shield' exercises. Zee News notes potential defense gaps as US assets redeploy to Middle East. No ICBM or nuclear test. 47 (rising — added barrage confirmation from additional sources).

russia_ukraine.notes: CRITICAL RISING. NEW SIGNALS: (1) Kyiv region strike — 4 killed, 15 wounded (3 critical). Combined missile/drone attack hit 4 districts, damaged residential buildings, schools, critical infrastructure (NPR/AP). (2) Russia launched ~430 drones and 68 missiles (Zelenskyy). (3) US POSTPONED Russia-Ukraine ceasefire talks due to Iran war (NPR) — peace process stalled. (4) Russia targeted Ukrzaliznytsia (railway) facilities, injuring staff (Ukrinform). (5) 460 Russian aerial targets intercepted by Ukrainian air defense. Zelenskyy warns: 'Russia will try to exploit war in Middle East to cause greater destruction in Europe.' Ukraine sending drone interceptor experts to help US bases in Jordan. 56 + 5 (Kyiv attack + talks postponement) + 5 (coupling) = 64. Trend rising.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: IMMINENT RISING — DAY 16 00:00. MAJOR ESCALATION: (1) Afghanistan claims 14 Pakistani soldiers killed in Durand Line operations (Kunar/Nangarhar provinces) — armored tank destroyed (ANI/Tribune). (2) Afghan Air Force struck 'Hamza' military center in Faizabad, Islamabad (Afghan MoD 'RejectOppression' campaign). (3) PAF strikes hit Hajj fuel depots at Kandahar Airport — civilian/UN flight supplies affected (Tolo News). (4) President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on civilians (LA Times/AP). (5) Roadside bomb killed 7 Pakistani police in Lakki Mawat. (6) China urges ceasefire — Wang Yi called Muttaqi, special envoy shuttling. (7) Afghanistan calls operations 'RejectOppression' — open war framing. Cycle: Afghan drones on Islamabad → PAF strikes Kandahar → Afghan forces hit Durand Line + Faizabad. No ceasefire in sight despite China/Turkey mediation. 25 + 60 + 8 (3 new signals) + 5 (coupling) = 98. Trend rising.

top_signals: AFGHANISTAN CLAIMS 14 PAKISTANI SOLDIERS KILLED — Durand Line operations in Kunar/Nangarhar, armored tank destroyed (ANI/Tribune)
AFGHAN AIR FORCE STRIKES FAIZABAD/ISLAMABAD — 'RejectOppression' campaign hits 'Hamza' military center in Pakistan capital (Afghan MoD)
PAF HITS HAJJ FUEL DEPOTS AT KANDAHAR AIRPORT — Civilian/UN flight supplies affected, Kam Air reserves destroyed (Tolo News)
IRAN THREATENS US-LINKED ENERGY INFRASTRUCTURE — Any American-linked oil/gas facilities in region targeted for retaliation (CNN/AJ)
PENTAGON VOWS TO RAMP UP MILITARY CAMPAIGN — 'Operation Epic Fury' intensifies against Iran (AJ liveblog)
US ORDERS AMERICANS OUT OF IRAQ — State Dept evacuation order as regional war expands (Guardian)
RUSSIA STRIKES KYIV — 4 killed, 15 wounded. 430 drones + 68 missiles. US postpones ceasefire talks due to Iran war (NPR/AP)
DPRK FIRES 10+ BALLISTIC MISSILES — Third provocation this week during US-SK drills. Defense gaps as US assets in Middle East (Reuters/Bloomberg/Guardian)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: ESCALATION DETECTED — MULTIPLE FRONTS: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN 88→98 — CRITICAL ESCALATION. Afghanistan claims 14 soldiers killed, Afghan Air Force strikes Faizabad/Islamabad 'Hamza' military center. PAF hits Hajj fuel depots at Kandahar. Zardari: 'red line crossed.' Open war framing with 'RejectOppression' campaign. China/Turkey mediation failing. (2) RUSSIA-UKRAINE 56→64 — Kyiv struck, 4 killed. US postpones peace talks due to Iran — Russia exploiting window. Zelenskyy warns of greater destruction. (3) DPRK 41→47 — 10+ missiles confirmed by 5+ sources. Defense gaps as US assets redeployed to ME. (4) IRAN — Pentagon ramps up, threatens energy infrastructure escalation. Iran threatens US-linked facilities across region. US orders Iraq evacuation. GLOBAL: 75→77% IMMINENT. SIX trackers IMMINENT (Iran conv 100, Pak-Afghan 98, Israel-Lebanon 92, Turkey 71, Russia-Ukraine 69). FOUR CRITICAL (Russia 50, DPRK 47). WATCH: (a) Pak-Afghanistan approaching point of no return — Afghan forces striking inside Pakistan, Pakistan calling it 'open war.' (b) Iran energy escalation — US threatens Kharg oil if Hormuz not reopened, Iran threatens ALL US-linked infrastructure. (c) Russia-Ukraine peace process frozen — US distraction = Russia escalation window. (d) DPRK exploiting US distraction for provocations.

latest_news.headline: Afghanistan claims 14 Pakistani soldiers killed in Durand Line operations
latest_news.text: Afghan MoD claims operations in Kunar/Nangarhar provinces killed 14 Pakistani soldiers, injured 11. Armored tank destroyed. Part of 'RejectOppression' campaign.

latest_news.headline: Afghan Air Force strikes 'Hamza' military center in Faizabad, Islamabad
latest_news.text: Afghan Air Force carried out airstrike on Pakistani military's strategic center 'Hamza' in Faizabad area. Operation named 'RejectOppression'.

latest_news.headline: PAF strikes hit Hajj fuel depots at Kandahar Airport
latest_news.text: Pakistan Air Force strikes hit fuel reserves at Kandahar Airport belonging to Kam Air airline. Fuel was for Hajj flights — civilian and UN flights affected.

latest_news.headline: President Zardari: Taliban 'crossed a red line' with drone attacks on civilians
latest_news.text: Pakistan's president warned Taliban government it crossed a 'red line.' Cross-border clashes show no signs of abating despite China/Turkey ceasefire efforts. Roadside bomb killed 7 police in Lakki Mawat.

latest_news.headline: Iran threatens to strike US-linked energy infrastructure across region
latest_news.text: Iran FM Araghchi vowed retaliation for Kharg Island strike — armed forces will strike any energy infrastructure tied to American companies in the region.

latest_news.headline: Pentagon vows to 'ramp up' military campaign against Iran
latest_news.text: Pentagon spokesperson says US will intensify military operations against Iran. 'Operation Epic Fury' continues with HIMARS and precision strikes.

latest_news.headline: US orders Americans to leave Iraq — regional evacuation
latest_news.text: US State Department orders all American citizens to depart Iraq immediately as regional war expands beyond Iran.

latest_news.headline: Russia strikes Kyiv region — 4 killed, 15 wounded. US postpones peace talks.
latest_news.text: Combined missile/drone attack on Kyiv region killed 4, wounded 15. Russia launched ~430 drones and 68 missiles. US postponed Russia-Ukraine ceasefire talks due to Iran war. Zelenskyy warns Russia exploiting ME conflict.

outlook: CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 77% IMMINENT (Day 16 00:00). MAJOR ESCALATION ON THREE FRONTS: (1) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN 98 IMMINENT RISING — Afghan Air Force strikes Islamabad area, claims 14 Pakistani soldiers killed on Durand Line. PAF hits Hajj fuel depots at Kandahar. 'RejectOppression' campaign = open war framing. Zardari: 'red line crossed.' China/Turkey mediation failing. (2) RUSSIA-UKRAINE 64 CRITICAL RISING — Kyiv struck, 4 killed, 430 drones + 68 missiles. US postpones peace talks — Russia exploiting Iran war distraction. Zelenskyy warns of greater destruction in Europe. (3) IRAN 100 IMMINENT RISING — Pentagon ramps up campaign, Iran threatens ALL US-linked infrastructure, US orders Iraq evacuation. Kharg oil remains pressure point. (4) DPRK 47 CRITICAL RISING — 10+ ballistic missiles, third provocation this week. US defense gaps as assets redeployed to ME. SIX trackers IMMINENT: Iran conventional (100), Pak-Afghanistan (98), Israel-Lebanon (92), Turkey (71). FOUR CRITICAL: Russia-Ukraine (64/69), Russia (42/50), DPRK (47). CRITICAL WATCH: (a) Pak-Afghanistan approaching point of no return — both sides striking each other's territory. (b) Iran energy escalation spiral — US threatens Kharg oil, Iran threatens all US-linked Gulf infrastructure. (c) Russia-Ukraine peace process frozen = Russia free to escalate. (d) DPRK testing US attention limits during ME distraction.
